name: AEGIS
tagline: Perimeter security automation across 80 global sites from weeks to hours

starry.situation: A global financial institution operated across dozens of sites with a mixed estate of Unix, Windows, and Cisco devices. Manual hardening and ad-hoc changes created drift, audit gaps, and misconfiguration risk across the perimeter.
starry.task: Design a programmatic security enforcement system to standardize configuration, reduce drift, and provide auditable control across servers and network devices.
starry.action: Architected AEGIS, a cross-platform security and configuration management system. Built a custom CLI for centralized enforcement across Unix, Windows, and network devices. Automated hardening playbooks, compliance checks, and change auditing across 80+ global sites.
starry.result: Configuration drift eliminated across the estate. Audit findings reduced significantly. Hardening cycles compressed from weeks to hours.
starry.return: Lowered operational risk from misconfiguration, reduced emergency change costs, and decreased audit findings through standardized, automated enforcement.
starry.yield: Established a sustainable, code-driven security model that scaled with growth, turning perimeter changes into fast, safe, and auditable workflows.
